description:
An Information Security Analyst has issued a mandate requiring that all secure Windows server infrastructure must be monitored for the presence of specific endpoint security agents. The mandate document is located at ~/Desktop/security_baseline_mandate.txt.

Your task is to:
1. Add three new Windows Services to OpManager's global catalog (Settings > Monitoring > Windows Services):
   - Service Name: 'csagent', Display Name: 'CrowdStrike-Falcon-Sensor'
   - Service Name: 'QualysAgent', Display Name: 'Qualys-Cloud-Agent'
   - Service Name: 'SplunkForwarder', Display Name: 'Splunk-Universal-Forwarder'
2. Create a new Device Template (Settings > Configuration > Device Templates) named 'Windows-Server-Secure-Baseline'.
3. Configure the template with Vendor: 'Microsoft' (or Windows), Category: 'Server', and System OID: '.1.3.6.1.4.1.311.1.1.3.1.3'.
4. Associate the three newly created Windows Services with this Device Template.

Application Credentials: admin / Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
